meta.title: From SKI to MO
meta.message: Ski mountaineering, or Ski Mo for short, is making its debut at the 2026 Games. In it, athletes race uphill and downhill on skis equipped with special skins and bindings. It combines endurance climbing and technical skills while traversing mountain terrain.
